title: auto pvp organize
description: Basically it a minecraft mod that lets you auto organize your inventory I mostly made this mod for donutsmp and crystal pvp but it is also useful for servers like pvplegacy and if you don't like the way pvplegacy put your inventory placement just use me
body: Basically it a minecraft mod that lets you auto organize your inventory I mostly made this mod for donutsmp and crystal pvp but it is also useful for servers like pvplegacy and if you don't like the way pvplegacy put your inventory placement just use the mod basically here a example if i am using an external pvp minecraft server but you cant change the loadout because their plugin doesnt work you can do that with our mod also our mod is built to not falsely flag minecraft anti cheats and the prob means we wont ad chest compatibility for obvious reasons also this is mostly for crystal pvp or if you wanna swap your inventory fast also another thing their is random & up organaztion that just either puts everything in your inventory up or random
